name: Mundo Check Cashing #5
description_short: Mundo Check Cashing #5 offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and payday loans at a Los Angeles location near N Figueroa St and Meridian St.
description_long:
Mundo Check Cashing #5 is a check-cashing and financial services outlet located in Los Angeles, CA at 6479 N Figueroa St in the 90042 zip code. The business operates as a multi-service financial access point serving the local community, particularly those who may not have traditional banking relationships or need rapid cash access. The company is positioned near the intersection of N Figueroa St and Meridian St, making it accessible to the surrounding neighborhood. Based on available review data, the location has been operating and serving customers since at least 2018.

Mundo Check Cashing #5 provides a range of financial services beyond basic check cashing. The company offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers through Western Union, bill payment services, and payday loans. These services are designed to meet the needs of customers requiring quick access to funds or alternative financial services. The business processes transactions for money transfers, including international remittances as documented in customer reviews mentioning money sent to Cambodia. They also handle payday loan applications for customers seeking short-term credit solutions.

The location distinguishes itself as a multi-service financial hub offering both basic cash services and credit products under one roof. Unlike standalone check-cashing operations, Mundo combines check cashing with Western Union money transfer capabilities and payday lending. The business serves a diverse customer base, evidenced by reviews mentioning both international money transfers and domestic payday loans. The operation maintains extended hours to accommodate working customers who need financial services outside traditional banking hours.

Customer experiences at this location are mixed. While some customers report positive interactions, particularly regarding money transfer services, others have reported negative experiences with payday loan processing, including long wait times (30-45 minutes) and customer service issues. The business holds a 2.5-star rating on Yelp based on three reviews, with one 5-star positive review, two 1-star negative reviews, and no middle-ground ratings. Service quality and wait times appear inconsistent. The business does not appear to have verified or optimized its online listing as of the data snapshot.

diagnosis: Mundo Check Cashing #5 is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in Los Angeles needing immediate access to check cashing, money transfers, or payday loans. The primary caveat is inconsistent customer service quality and long wait times, with mixed reviews suggesting reliability varies significantly by visit or staff member.
